data.title: AI Detection and Repurposed Drugs Signal New Era in Food Allergy Research at Food Allergy Fund Summit
data.description: In New York City, the Food Allergy Fund (FAF) recently hosted its annual Summit, bringing together experts in the field to discuss groundbreaking advancements in food allergy care. Key takeaways from the event included the introduction of innovative technologies such as AI-powered anaphylaxis detection, which are poised to revolutionize early intervention practices. Additionally, significant strides were made in repurposing FDA-approved drugs for treating allergies, indicating a promising shift from conventional methods. The Summit underscored the importance of proactive approaches in addressing food allergies and showcased the potential for novel therapies in this sector.

data.title: WISI Expands Tangram Video Platform to Deliver Higher Density, 10G Performance, and Enhanced Security
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 29, 2026, WISI revealed the launch of the GT10 chassis designed to support 10G and introduced the GT2300 high-density QAM software package for the Tangram Video Platform. This announcement showcases WISI's focus on carrier-grade video technologies with cutting-edge capabilities. The GT10 chassis provides robust 10G support, catering to the increasing demand for high-speed connectivity. Additionally, the GT2300 software package offers enhanced density for QAM on the Tangram Video Platform, demonstrating WISI's commitment to delivering advanced solutions.

data.title: HelloNation Websites Highlight Paving Expert Stephen Carozza as a Local Resource for Pittsford Neighborhoods
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Pittsford, NY, homeowners and property owners are being advised on selecting a local paving expert for their driveway and pavement requirements. It is essential for Pittsford residents to be aware of crucial information when deciding on a paving professional. This guidance is intended to assist property owners in making informed decisions when hiring contractors for their paving projects.

data.title: NJ Neurosurgeon First to Use Robotic-Assisted Technology in an Ambulatory Surgery Center
data.description: In April 29, 2026, Redefine Healthcare revealed that David Wells-Roth, MD, a board-certified and fellowship-trained neurosurgeon, achieved a significant milestone by becoming the inaugural provider globally to conduct robotic-assisted spine surgery in an ambulatory surgery center (ASC). This groundbreaking surgery marked a major advancement in medical technology and patient care, potentially altering the landscape of spine surgeries.

data.title: Fed Holds Rates Unchanged: Traders Brace For Powell's Likely Final Presser (UPDATED)
data.description: The Federal Reserve decided to keep the benchmark federal funds rate steady at 3.50-3.75% in the latest policy decision led by Chair Jerome Powell. There was a notable dissent from Governor Stephen Miran who favored a 0.25% rate cut. Concerns about elevated inflation due to surging global energy prices were highlighted, signaling a more hawkish stance compared to the previous assessment of inflation as "somewhat elevated." The Committee also emphasized the impact of developments in the Middle East on creating uncertainty in the economic outlook. Notably, members Beth M. Hammack, Neel Kashkari, and Lorie K. Logan supported maintaining rates without introducing any easing bias. This decision is perceived as Powell's final move before Kevin Warsh takes over as Chair on May 15.
FED CHAIR POWELL: WE WILL WANT TO SEE THE BACKSIDE OF BOTH THE ENERGY AND TARIFF SHOCKS BEFORE EVEN CONSIDERING RATE CUTS, ADDING THAT THE ENERGY SURGE HAS NOT YET REACHED ITS PEAK.
